feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: RFC function module Maximum number of GUI windows reached error
entry.content:
Hello, When I use the function, it returns successfully, but it gives an error that the maximum number of gui windows has been reached. It only gives when I use this function.

There is no such problem when I look at other systems.
CALL FUNCTION ... STARTING NEW TASK the same problem happened.

rdisp/max_alt_modes parameter 16 on the system.

  CALL FUNCTION '/SCWM/TO_CREATE_WHR'
        EXPORTING
          iv_process     = '2'
          iv_lgnum       = mv_lgnum
          iv_mve_hu      = abap_true
          iv_mve_mat     = space
          iv_mve_hu_mult = space
          iv_squit       =  mv_internal
          iv_to_init     = abap_true
          iv_bname       = sy-uname
          iv_wtcode      = space
          it_create_whr  = mt_pull[]
          iv_commit_work = abap_true
        IMPORTING
          ev_tanum       = lv_tanum
          et_ltap_vb     = lt_ltab_vb
          et_bapiret     = lt_return
          ev_severity    = lv_severity.

what is the solution? how can i do it?

Thanks in advance.

 

ABAP Development Basis Technology EWM - Basic Functions

entry.title: Store file content into a Z table
entry.content:
Hello,

One of our external partner is sending a flat file into our SAP system's folder, our custom prog is reading the file and creating the POs in SAP, well, but we want to make sure that the external partner should not send the same file again, want to avoid duplicating. External Partner is not accepting to provide any kind of Identifier or unique ID or GUID or time stamp inside the file so that our custom prog validate the duplication, pls. let us know how to avoid the duplication or processing the same file again? What about our custom prog will store all the file content in a Z table after converting it into binary data (like SAP stores long texts) so every single time our custom prog will validate current file content with stored content in the Z table, our system is unicode enabled / ECC?

Thank you

entry.title: Some parallelly-processed IDocs remain 64
entry.content:
Please skip this question, I'm posting an answer. Even after years of ABAP, I sometimes forget to verify the essential things.

I'm processing inbound IDocs via BD20/RBDAPP01, in parallel mode, with packages of 5 IDocs. Sometimes, all the IDocs of one package remain in status 64 (to be processed), and no error is shown in BD20.

It seems to be random. Running BD20 again processed successfully these remaining IDocs.

I did some debug and couldn't find the reason. Debug seems preventing the bug to happen.

I ran BD20 with the option "Wait end of processing", and still IDocs remain in status 64, but no error.

What could be the issue?

My system: ABAP 7.40 SP08.

entry.title: How to start using SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

I have installed SAP Mobile Start on Mobile.

I would like to connect to my SAP Fiori system to approve purchase requistion, purchase order etc .abap

First screen asking to scan QR code.

How to start pls?

entry.title: How to determine if a BAPI execution is successful or not?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm new to BAPIs and trying to understand the best way to determine whether a BAPI execution was successful. I have a few questions regarding this:

  1. Is the RETURN array the correct field to always check for execution status? If so, are there any standard rules for interpreting it? For example:

    • If any entry in the RETURN array has TYPE = 'E', consider it a failure.
    • If all entries have TYPE = 'S', consider it a success.
    • How should we interpret other types like W (Warning) or I (Information)?
    • What should be considered when the RETURN array is completely empty? Does an empty RETURN array always indicate success?

  2. Is there a better or more reliable way to determine the execution status of a BAPI?

Any insights or best practices would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: ALV report output screen will be blank.
entry.content: If we choose variant and execute the report , output will  be displayed if we stay in same screen , meanwhile if we try to switch tabs or windows to excel or any other work , output screen will be blank.

entry.title: Flexible Workflow - Agent Determination Rule Failed
entry.content:
Hello!

I have set up the flexible workflow scenario for Sales Orders and I want to use the team Functionality .

I set up the Teams and Responsibilities : 

and the respective sales workflows

My workflows are getting triggered ,but there's no agent determined.

You can see the error below:

Now , it seemed strange to me that the system can't find the agent responsibility rule ,so I digged in and find the standard rule ID for the workflow template

So , my guess is that this rule /FUNC/CMR1LVLA ,cannot be determined.

I used the fiori apps "Manage Responsibility Rules" and "Manage Responsibility Context"

In the first one , there is no /FUNC/CMR1LVLA in the list , which strikes me as unusual.

Also in the second one , there is no agent rule assigned.

So , is there something missing? 

I would expect to see the /FUNC/CMR1LVLA in the Responsibility Rules and Assigned to WS02000006 in the Responsibility Context.

Do I have to "install" these via a note or something?

Also , is there anything else I can check?

entry.title: S/4HANA On Premise Fiori App Custom field BAPI_PO_CHANGE
entry.content:
Any moderator that can delete this message? I don't see a delete option anywhere.

Sorry.

entry.title: How to Add attachments from GOS to class based workflow decision ?
entry.content:
Greetings.

I have created a workflow using class(SE24).  I have GOS function from which user can add attachments. Now i want to show these attachments under "Objects & Attachments" in decision workitem of the workflow. How to link the business object used for GOS with class based workflow and show attachments from it ?

entry.title: graduation project : SAP Based Smart Job Tracking System Hello,
entry.content:
Hello,

The topic of my graduation project is to develop an SAP Based Smart Job Tracking System. In this project, I aim to optimise job tracking and management processes using the SAP ERP system. My goal is to create a system that allows users to plan and track their daily tasks and perform performance analysis via SAP GUI or a web/mobile interface.

Within the scope of the project, I plan to develop a solution that includes the following main functions:

SAP ABAP Based Job Tracking System: I plan to provide business logic and data management with SAP ABAP.
User Based Task Assignment and Tracking Module: It will be a module where tasks are assigned and tracked for users.
AI Supported Performance Analysis and Reporting: Performance predictions and analyses will be made using machine learning and data mining.
Web Interface: I will develop a user-friendly interface using SAP Fiori or an independent platform.
Database Integration (SAP HANA): I plan to use SAP's HANA system as a database.
Integration with Non-SAP Data with Web Services: Integration with non-SAP data sources using REST API.


I am currently in the idea phase of this project and I am not quite sure what steps I should take to get started. I have a lot of ideas for the project, but I honestly don't know how to realise them yet. I would like to find out what kind of resources I should turn to in order to gain in-depth knowledge about SAP, ABAP, SAP HANA, Web services and AI. I am especially looking for basic guides or step-by-step guides on these technologies. I would also like to learn about the possible challenges I might face in this project and get more suggestions.

I plan to use web services for external data integration in the project.

I would like to get your suggestions and feedback on the development of the project and its integration with SAP. I would be very grateful if you can provide guidance on which resources I should take a look at. Thank you very much in advance if you take your valuable time and reply.

Yours sincerely,
Zeynep

Translated with DeepL.com (free version)

entry.title: Release after output
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

What does "Release after output" check box mean in NACE t-code?

I tested and found that whether it is checked or not, it will still print the output. I don't understand much about this function.

Thanks and Regards

entry.title: Unable to edit ABAP Language version of a database table in eclipse ADT.
entry.content:
Hello All,

we have created a new database table and saved in a package for which the "The Default ABAP Language Version" is set to ABAP for Cloud Development, but the software component is updated to HOME (Standard ABAP). Later we have updated the software component the package to "ABAP for Cloud". Now we wanted to change the ABAP language version of the table that was already created to ABAP for Cloud development from Standard ABAP. But the field is not input enabled in eclipse ADT.

How can we update this? If this is not possible to update, do we get any issues if we keep this ABAP Language Version to Standard ABAP in TIER1 Package.

 

Regards,

Ram Peddireddi

entry.title: "This message is from an external sender" creates folder in clients mail box
entry.content:
Hello All, we are triggering mails to user which mail domain is out side of organization.

Smart form is generating this PDF and using CL_BCS we are triggering mail to user.

 

 

The issue is whenever we trigger PDF from invoice VF02, user is getting PDF attachment inside the folder, which is not happening in our mail ids.

It is something like Outlook is creating secure folder for user since mail is coming from outside of his organization, but user doesn’t need this folder.

If anyone faced this issue please let me know the solution, it could be from SAP or Outlook mail box setting.

entry.title: Can Variant Management be used to switch between List View and Reporting View with the same data?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently working on a Fiori application where I need to present the same underlying data in two different views: a classic List View and a Reporting View (for example, an OverviewPage). My question is:

Is it possible to use Variant Management to switch between these two distinct app views?

So far, I've used Variant Management primarily for storing and restoring filters, columns, or layout settings within a single template. However, my idea is to see if I can leverage it to swap out entire templates (i.e., switching from a List View to a Reporting View) while using the same data source.

If anyone has experience with this scenario or can share insights on whether this is feasible—or if not, what alternative approaches (such as routing or cross-application navigation) might be recommended—I would greatly appreciate your input.

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Purchase Requisition ME52N: clear the item deletion status
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm a beginner in PR's management, and I would need help to update (through ABAP code) a PR item that has been set as deleted (Status = Deleted).

What I exactly need is to programmatically remove the item deletion status, that is to say, set the item back to life.

 

Thank you so much for any help in this regard.

JF

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02 - Weiterführung nach Testphase & ABAP-Entwicklung
entry.content:
Hallo zusammen,

wir haben die 30-Tage-Testversion "SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02, Fully-Activated Appliance" genutzt und diese hat für unser Startup Unternehmen erfolgreich funktioniert. Nun möchten wir die Umgebung kostenpflichtig weiterführen.

Soweit ich verstanden habe, ist hierfür eine gültige S/4HANA-Lizenz erforderlich.
Ich gehe davon aus, dass folgende Lizenz für uns passend wäre:
Cloud Test, Demo, and Development for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, one-system landscape (8012331) – 450,00 EUR

Meine Fragen dazu:

  1. Sobald wir diese Lizenz erworben haben, können wir dann unsere bestehende SAP Cloud Appliance Library (CAL)-Instanz weiterführen oder muss eine neue Instanz aufgesetzt werden?
  2. Aktuell erhalten wir erwerben einer SAP CAL Abonnent folgende Fehlermeldung – ist das normal, solange keine gültige Lizenz hinterlegt ist?
  3. Können wir auf der "SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02, Fully-Activated Appliance"-Instanz eigene ABAP-Programme entwickeln und einen Namensraum reservieren?

Vielen Dank im Voraus für eure Unterstützung!

Beste Grüße
zero4788

--

Hello everyone,

We have been using the "SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02, Fully-Activated Appliance" 30-day trial, and it has worked successfully for our startup. Now, we would like to continue using it on a paid basis.

As I understand, a valid S/4HANA license is required for this. I assume the following license would be the right choice for us:
Cloud Test, Demo, and Development for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, one-system landscape (8012331) – 450.00 EUR

My questions regarding this:

  1. Once we purchase this license, can we continue using our existing SAP Cloud Appliance Library (CAL) instance, or do we need to set up a new one?
  2. We are currently receiving an error message when to buy CAL abbonenent– is this normal as long as there is no valid license assigned?


  3. Can we develop our own ABAP programs and reserve a namespace on the "SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02, Fully-Activated Appliance" instance?

Thanks in advance for your support!

Best regards,
zero4788

entry.title: Fiori : add new field on screen
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

Is it possible to add new field on this screen?

any instructions will be helpful.

Regards,

Manthana

entry.title: How to handle errors for semantic key with number range in RAP?
entry.content:
Following scenario:

Managed RAP BO wit draft with managed numbering and UUID as key. In addition a semantic key should be generated by the system as a non-key field using a number range object. How do you do this correctly?

I tried using a determination on save and using number_get_next there. That works usually, but:

  • In case of errors you can only report a warning in a determination using reported as there is no failed which the user can chose to ignore. According to the documentation (https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/determination-and-validation-modelling#failed-entries-from-determinations) you should store the error somewhere in a buffer and check for it in a validation.
  • While that does work, in case of an error the save is blocked but also the number from the number range has still been picked since the LUW used in the determination is not rolled back? This results in a number gap.

I had a look at late unmanaged numbering but that only seems to be usable for the key field which in my case should still be managed numbering with UUID.

Is this scenario not covered or am I missing something?

entry.title: Dynamic assignment variant for Field-symbols not allowed
entry.content:
I have a class in which I have defined various Text elements.
For eg.
H01=Title1
H02=Title2
H03=Title3
H04=Title4
etc.
I am trying to print all the titles in my class. I have a loop in my class and I am building the text element name dynamically.

lv_title = `TEXT-H` && conv ty_n2( sy-tabix ).

Now, I use this variable to dynamically access the text element in the program

assign (lv_title) to <title>.

Class is syntactically correct and executes fine with expected results.

But, I get a warning saying: "The old variant of "<dynamic-object>" should not be used in the current ABAP language version."

If this is considered the "old" variant, what is the equivalent "new" variant to access variables by name?

I am on ABAP Cloud version, so that limits the commands available to me (for eg. READ TEXTPOOL isn't available to me)

entry.title: CDS View to get Purchase Requisition Approval Detail in SAP Public Cloud System
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Please recommend us CDS view to be use in Eclipse ADT for purchase requisition workflow approval details in SAP public cloud system which include Status, notes during approval, processor, approval date etc.

We found below service which is returning the results as we need however we could not use in ADT or when used in Business Application Studio we could not deploy the application.

  • "/sap/opu/odata/sap/SWF_FLEX_DEF_SRV/GetApplicationWorkflowInstances"

Regards,

Iftikhar Ali
